overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sunlit city sidewalk during golden hour. The scene transitions from an area with an elevated highway structure to a commercial district with neon-lit outdoor seating, featuring a mix of low-rise residential buildings and distant futuristic skyscrapers.

events.description: white car drives past on the road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a pedestrian in a brown jacket

notable_agents.action: person in brown jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk at a steady pace

entered.detail: large metal elevated highway or rail structure with decorative trusses casting long shadows
tall glass and steel towers with illuminated signage visible in the distance
weathered wooden fencing along the right side of the road
tall palm trees lining the street with dry fronds
utility poles and overhead wires spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of an urban sidewalk bordered by an elevated highway structure on the left. The camera follows a pedestrian in a brown jacket walking ahead, with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance. A white car passes by on the right as the character walks along the concrete path lined with palm trees and wooden fencing.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk past outdoor seating areas and storefronts, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: low-rise teal colored building with white trim and traditional architectural elements
large outdoor patio umbrella with glowing purple neon lighting underneath
wooden tables and chairs arranged under the neon umbrella
American flag hanging from the building facade near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a distinctive teal building featuring a glowing purple neon umbrella over outdoor seating. The American flag hangs from the building's facade as the elevated highway structure recedes behind. The futuristic skyline shifts to the right as the camera continues down the commercial street.

events.description: pedestrian in red jacket walks past the camera from right to left, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking toward the setting sun, passing various storefronts and oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket and yellow pants walking toward the camera from the opposite direction

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with electrical transformers and street light fixtures
large green industrial dumpster on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking directly toward the bright setting sun, which creates a strong lens flare. Having passed the teal building and its neon umbrella, the view opens up to show more of the street lined with utility poles and various storefronts. A pedestrian in a red jacket passes by in the opposite direction as the camera continues down the sunlit sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit urban sidewalk that transitions from the shadow of an elevated highway into a bright, open commercial district. It begins by following a pedestrian in a brown jacket past palm trees and wooden fencing, with a white car passing by and futuristic skyscrapers looming in the hazy distance. As the character moves forward, the highway structure recedes and the scene shifts toward a teal building adorned with an American flag and a glowing purple neon umbrella over outdoor seating. The view then expands further down the street, passing utility poles and storefronts while a pedestrian in a red jacket walks in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera turns directly toward the setting sun, filling the frame with a strong lens flare as the character continues down the golden-lit path.
